title: Origins Spirits
description: Adds spirits that rule over fire, water, land, wind, electricity, ice, plants, metal, light, and darkness.
body:
![This datapack's title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bc59fba36de9d89fa3191ec603a8319b1dc754.png)

Adds Origin, which is about the spirits that rule the elements.
## **What is this mod?**
This mod adds Origins for the spirits that rule over fire, water, land, wind, electricity, ice, plants, metal, light, and darkness.
Each Origin has a unique ability, like swimming underwater or forcing opponents into a storm.
This mod perfectly expands the experience of the original Origins mod.

## **What's being added?**

- **Fire Spirit**: You can create fire around you and attack mobs around you. In the very hot Nether, you become much more powerful.
- **Water Spirit**: You can transform into water and become very powerful in water. You can trap mobs in water with just your attacks.
- **Land Spirit**: You can dig into everything underground to find hidden minerals. You can change the ground at will, so you can swim and walk through the ground, making animals around you disappear into the ground.
- **Wind Spirit**: You can fly without wings and get propulsion by yourself. In addition, you can throw wind charge to trap animals in the storm.
- **Electro Spirit**: Animals around you will be affected by electricity. You can also cause large lightning to protect you.
- **Ice Spirit**: You become weaker in hot places and stronger in cold places. It is especially very dangerous to stay in the Nether for a long time. And all animals you touch will freeze.
- **Plant Spirit**: If you eat bone meal, you will grow and become stronger. Also, your survival power is very strong and you will not die easily.
- **Metal Spirit**: They can fly using their robot-like bodies and can turn their bodies into liquid metal to attack with high temperatures.
- **Light Spirit**: You have the power of light, which allows you to run extremely fast at the speed of light and also allows you to gather and release the power of light to create explosions.
- **Darkness Spirit**: You can hide your appearance in the darkness and attack secretly, or reach out the hand of darkness to tie up animals, but your power is out of control and the tools you hold are more and more broken.

**I am currently developing the Soul Spirit. I am going to add Soul Spirit when Origins RELEASE version 1.21.1 is release.**

## **What do I need to use this mod?**
his mod is an Origins-based mod, so it requires the Origins mod for Minecraft 1.21.1. Also, the Pehkui mod is required.

##
**The English was translated using a translator. So there may be unnatural translations.** If you find any unnatural translations, please let us know and we will actively correct them.
